description.value: Project zod schemas to explicit, fast-types-clean TypeScript, so a package can author its validation in zod without forfeiting JSR fast-types (zod's inferred types are too generic for JSR's fast analyzer — exporting one caps your package's score).  zod schema ──z. toJSONSchema…
